title: Remove logo from a form that I created
excerpt: I want to remove a logo from a form that I have created. So I inserted my own logo in a form that IO have created. I now want to change that logo and I am unable to do so.

posts.author: Zaahid_kara (zaahid)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to remove a logo from a form that I have created. So I inserted my own logo in a form that IO have created. I now want to change that logo and I am unable to do so.

posts.author: Angie81171 (Angie Louth)
posts.cookedHtml:
For me, when I open the form I want to edit, I click “Edit Form” and then hover my mouse over the logo which a small trashcan is revealed to the left of the logo. It is a bit hidden.
Hope this helps.
